creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #2)
That would help, but it's possible that pkgbase packages will have some post-install scripts that rely on other packages.  IMO the right answer is that some packages must be marked such that the solver does not split the upgrade job for them.  But yes, having some special ordering for pkgbase packages during upgrades makes sense.
